description: Ticketmaster is a live-event ticketing and event-discovery platform. Its developer portal offers APIs for searching events and, for approved partners, commerce and publishing workflows around ticketing and event data.
summary: Ticketmaster exposes a public MCP server, plus documented HTTP APIs for Discovery, Commerce, and Publish; Discovery and Commerce use Ticketmaster-issued developer access, while Publish auth could not be confirmed from the available public docs/spec excerpts.
